2606.22274.title: From Speech to Text Corpora: Evaluating ASR-Based Data Acquisition for Low-Resource Fongbe and Hausa
2606.22274.paper_summary: Low-resource African languages lack text corpora needed for language model training. We investigate whether ASR pipelines can extend text resources for two typologically distinct West African languages: Fongbe (tonal, diacritic-rich) and Hausa (non-tonal). We fine-tune MMS-300M on a curated 12.3-hour Fongbe dataset, achieving 9.48% WER on the ALFFA benchmark - a 78% relative reduction from the prior 44.04% baseline - while preserving tonal diacritics critical to the language. For Hausa, we apply an existing fine-tuned Whisper-Small model. We catalog 1,553 YouTube videos (236 hours) and process a subset of 424 videos (45.49 hours) selected to balance domain diversity with available computational resources, producing 6,770 transcribed segments. Human evaluation on 50 randomly sampled segments per language shows mean quality scores of 57.4/100 for Hausa and 36.5/100 for Fongbe, indicating that while Hausa transcriptions approach acceptable quality for corpus construction, Fongbe transcriptions require post-processing or improved models for production use. We release the curated dataset, fine-tuned model, transcribed corpus, and full video catalog following platform terms and ethical guidelines.
2606.22274.paper_summary_zh: 低資源的非洲語言缺乏用於語言模型訓練的文本語料庫。我們調查了自動語音識別（ASR）管道是否能為兩種類型上明顯不同的西非語言擴展文本資源：豐貝語（音調，帶有變音符號）和豪薩語（非音調）。我們在一個精心挑選的12.3小時豐貝語數據集上微調MMS-300M，實現了在ALFFA基準上9.48%的字錯誤率（WER）——相較於之前的44.04%基準，實現了78%的相對減少——同時保留了對該語言至關重要的音調變音符號。對於豪薩語，我們應用了一個現有的微調Whisper-Small模型。我們編目1,553個YouTube視頻（236小時），並處理424個視頻（45.49小時）的子集，這些視頻是為了平衡領域多樣性與可用計算資源而選擇的，產生了6,770個轉錄段落。對每種語言隨機抽樣的50個段落進行的人類評估顯示，豪薩語的平均質量分數為57.4/100，而豐貝語為36.5/100，這表明雖然豪薩語的轉錄接近於可接受的語料庫構建質量，但豐貝語的轉錄需要後處理或改進模型才能用於生產。我們根據平台條款和倫理指導方針發布了精心挑選的數據集、微調模型、轉錄語料庫和完整的視頻目錄。
2606.22274.author: Mahounan Pericles Adjovi et.al.
2606.22274.authors: Mahounan Pericles Adjovi, Victor Olufemi, Roald Eiselen, Prasenjit Mitra
